data.body: 9597 implementation/validation: standard-tier gpt-5.6-terra worker, 1 attempt, saw only 2 happy-path tests; happy GREEN 2/2. Restored held-out oracle: initial 3/4 GREEN with one test defect (over-specific blurb prose), corrected under revert-first discipline and reconfirmed 4/4 RED before reapplying code; full held-out GREEN 4/4. Mutation extra=agents made both held-out tests RED; refactoring litmus passed. Dependency review: lizard 1.23.0 current release, MIT, ~100KB wheel, OSV 0 known vulns; actual [metrics] install/load smoke passed, then lizard removed from venv to restore canonical missing-tool tests. Preflight: make lint PASS; make typecheck PASS (370 files); make test PASS (7091 passed, 29 skipped, 112 deselected, 14 warnings, 28m04s). Staged secret scan clean; five-axis local review found no correctness/security/performance/architecture blockers and added the missing [metrics] optionality docstring entry.
